summary: Review accepts the Harbor #158 runtime session lifecycle implementation. The PR adds local browser session open/reuse/lock/release/stop behavior, public page/control/error facts, and tests without expanding into hosted browser, credential storage, login automation, or cross-repo changes.
reviewed_validation_summary: `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm smoke:runtime`, `git diff --check`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item HARBOR-165 --json`, `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item HARBOR-165 --json`, and `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item HARBOR-165 --json` passed locally on 2026-07-06T07:35Z.
follow_ups: Harbor #160 should consume the runtime session lifecycle to produce real scene evidence/viewer refs.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The implementation matches Harbor #158 stories #8/#9/#10 and keeps provider scope to CloakBrowser primary/default, official Chrome restricted fallback, and Donut Browser mechanism reference only.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: Runtime session lifecycle modules are split below the file-size threshold, validation passed, and public facts avoid raw CDP endpoint, credentials, cookies, tokens, full profile path, raw DOM, HAR, or storage material.
